    clock_gettime.2: Clarify CLOCK_*

    Clarify that CLOCK_* (e.g., CLOCK_REALTIME) do not necessarily default
    to CLOCK_*_FAST.

    PR:             259642

 1 file changed, 12 insertions(+), 3 deletions(-)
